mnemonics.title: Phases of 2PC
mnemonics.content: **V**ote then **D**ecide. Coordinator: 'Can I get a **V**ote?' then 'Here is my **D**ecision'.

mnemonics.title: Problem with 2PC
mnemonics.content: **B**locked **C**oordinator **F**ailure. If the Coordinator Fails after the vote, participants are Blocked.

mnemonics.title: Phases of 3PC
mnemonics.content: **C**an we? **P**romise we will. **D**o it! (CanCommit?, PreCommit, DoCommit)
